title: eleocharis liouana
intro: Eleocharis liouana, also known as Lious sedge, is a type of plant belonging to the family Cyperaceae, characterized by its slender stems and small, scale-like leaves. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. Eleocharis liouana is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
